blended.narrative: Devil's Head is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 11 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,495 ft. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 6" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 26°F, winds around 22 mph. Expect powder.
Wednesday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
